case_title: JOSEPH PASSANISI et al VS. SOKKEAR CHAY et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PASSANISI, JOSEPH PASSANISI, BETTY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAY, SOKKEAR PHORK, SOBOEUN INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA SUNRISE CAFE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 540 NORTH POINT ST. S.F. CA. (SEE TEXT), (FORMERLY KNOWN AS SPACE 108 OF THE BUILDING COMMONLY KNOWN AS 2627 TAYLOR ST. S.F. CA. 94133) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY DECLARATION RE; DAILY RENTAL VALUE; AS TO DEFENDANT CHAY, SOKKEAR PHORK, SOBOEUN INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA SUNRISE CAFE

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS-UNLAWFUL DETAINER; COMPLAINT; PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF PASSANISI, JOSEPH PASSANISI, BETTY SERVED OCT-26-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHAY, SOKKEAR

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PASSANISI, JOSEPH PASSANISI, BETTY SERVED OCT-28-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PHORK, SOBOEUN INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA SUNRISE CAFE

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS-UNLAWFUL DETAINER; COMPLAINT(COMMERCIAL LEASE); PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF PASSANISI, JOSEPH PASSANISI, BETTY SERVED OCT-26-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PHORK, SOBOEUN INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA SUNRISE CAFE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PASSANISI, JOSEPH PASSANISI, BETTY AS TO DEFENDANT CHAY, SOKKEAR PHORK, SOBOEUN INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA SUNRISE CAFE DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT CHAY, SOKKEAR PHORK, SOBOEUN INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA SUNRISE CAFE

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO POSSESSION OF PREMISE ONLY WITH FURTHER COST OF $85.00. AS TO DEFENDANT CHAY, SOKKEAR PHORK, SOBOEUN INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA SUNRISE CAFE
